verification: ✅ Measured on real hardware (AMD RX 5700 XT, 2026-03-23). Wall-clock perf_counter with 100 warmup + 100 timed iterations. No fabricated numbers.
_notes: DirectML device string is privateuseone:0 — this is expected, not an error.
Float16 is unreliable on DirectML; this benchmark intentionally uses float32.
torch-directml requires Python 3.11 — hard ABI ceiling, 3.12+ silently unavailable.
Install: pip install torch-directml (pulls torch 2.4.1 automatically — do NOT pre-install torch).
